race.description: ANZAC DAY LEST WE FORGET RATING 75
race.comment: IMPERATIVE (8) has come of age over a middle distance, and the manner in which she finished her last run off over 2147m at Riverton 3 weeks ago says she will have no problem with 2600m. She drops 2.5kg and can repeat. HENRY THOMAS (2) won over this trip here by a short-head 5 weeks ago, and he cops an extra 3kg for that win. He is lightly tried, and with more to come, he will be hard to hold out again. AVORIAZ (9) ran on too late over 2000m here a fortnight ago, and this is the sort of trip she is looking for. A wide gate won't matter as she gets back, and she is good enough to take this out. UNLEASH THE BEAST (7) sustained a long run to score over 2200m at Ashburton last time out, and he will be looking to turn this into a true staying test as well. Stick with him. MISS ENZED (4) has been close up in her last 3 starts, and she won't have any problem with a heavy track. She tries 2600m for the first time, and can go one better.
